title: 11 Herbal Teas to Ease Eye Strain for Office Workers
description: Achillea millefolium teas, also known as yarrow tea, has been used for centuries to alleviate eye strain due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The tea contains constituents such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which work together to reduce swelling and promote healing in the eyes.
